'''Fiz Cor'gril''', better known as '''Fizzi''', was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] who lived on [[Trevi IV]] where he ran a used-ship warehouse known as [[Fizzi's Slightly Used Starships]].

==Biography==
Cor'gril had trouble succeeding on his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Clak'dor VII/Legends|Clak'dor VII]] so he left to try to find his way in the [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]]. He had many jobs, many that were dubiously legal, and gained knowledge of business and [[Starship/Legends|starships]]. After accumulating a large amount of [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]], he decided to settle down and start his own business. Cor'gril traveled to Trevi IV and bought a large starship garage that was going out of business due to competition from newer docking bays in the [[Trevi City]] Spaceport. Using his contacts from his travels, he obtained several ships and opened his business. He was well regarded by [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] and free traders who appreciated the ships and services he provided.<ref name="AJ9" />

In his possession was the sabotaged [[Yacht/Legends|yacht]] ''[[Firerider]]'', bought from its previous owner [[Serdo]].<ref name="ss">''[[Stock Ships]]''</ref>

==Personality and traits==
Cor'gril was intelligent and polite. He didn't pressure his clients like most sales beings, instead preferring to talk politely. He had a tendency to be verbose. He would downplay any deficiencies with his products while trying to find the best ship for his client. The Bith would fill his contracts with fine print that would relieve him of any responsibility of any violations of Imperial regulations.<ref name="AJ9" />
